name: E2E mode - Playwright setup and login test
prompt: Playwright로 로그인 → 대시보드 접근 E2E 테스트를 작성해줘. 프로젝트에 Playwright가 설치되어 있지 않아. localhost:3000에서 웹앱이 돌아간다고 가정해.
expected_output: refs/e2e-playwright.md를 참조하고, Playwright 미설치 상황 처리, data-testid 사용, waitForTimeout 미사용

assertions.text: Agent reads the e2e-playwright.md reference file before writing tests
Agent detects Playwright is not installed and provides setup instructions (npm init playwright@latest or npx playwright install)
Agent uses data-testid locators, not CSS selectors or XPath
Agent does NOT use page.waitForTimeout() anywhere in the test code
Agent uses proper waits (waitForResponse, waitForURL, expect().toBeVisible()) instead of arbitrary timeouts
Agent does NOT hard-code credentials in the test file
